description_long: This bench features a wide, flat wooden seat with a matching wooden backrest, both supported by four robust, rectangular black metal legs. The seat and backrest are joined with visible metal fasteners, giving the bench a modern, utilitarian appearance. The wood has a light, natural finish with subtle grain patterns, while the legs are sleek and sturdy, likely powder-coated for durability. The bench is designed for communal or public use, offering ample seating space for multiple people. Its clean lines and minimalist construction make it suitable for urban parks, plazas, or contemporary indoor waiting areas. The absence of armrests and the solid, angular leg design emphasize functionality and ease of access from either side.
description: A modern bench with a light wood seat and backrest, supported by four black metal legs. It has a minimalist, functional design suitable for public or urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden seat and backrest, with all four black metal legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the seat and backrest, and the depth of the bench with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the backrest and seat with the same leg arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bench's slim profile and leg placement.
